---
name: 'Property request '
about: Suggest the addition of a new property
title: '"insert property name please"'
labels: property, suggest
assignees: ''

---

**For which type/entity would you like to suggest a new property for?**
Properties are related to types/entities. Please describe the corresponding type/entity the property you want to suggest is related to.

**Which property would you like to suggest?**
Please name the suggested property.

**How is the suggested property defined?**
Please provide an understandable definition of the suggested property.

**What are possible values of the suggested property?**
Please describe one or multiple value types (text, URL, a type/entity, boolean, etc.). If the set of values is a list of terms from a controlled vocabulary, please list these terms if possible.
